'''zadata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:loading|loading]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-d-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loading|loading]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zadata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zædætæth|zædætæth]] || [[word:zædætæj|zædætæj]] || [[word:zædætæsh|zædætæsh]] || [[word:zædætæ|zædætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zadadatath|zadadatath]] || [[word:zadadataj|zadadataj]] || [[word:zadadatash|zadadatash]] || [[word:zadadata|zadadata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zadatath|zadatath]] || [[word:zadataj|zadataj]] || [[word:zadatash|zadatash]] || [[word:zadata|zadata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zadaftath|zadaftath]] || [[word:zadaftaj|zadaftaj]] || [[word:zadaftash|zadaftash]] || [[word:zadaftaf|zadaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zadatatha|zadatatha]] || [[word:zadataja|zadataja]] || [[word:zadatasha|zadatasha]] || [[word:zadataka|zadataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zadatath|zadatath]] || [[word:zadataj|zadataj]] || [[word:zadatash|zadatash]] || [[word:zadata|zadata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zadatathal|zadatathal]] || [[word:zadatajal|zadatajal]] || [[word:zadatashal|zadatashal]] || [[word:zadatakal|zadatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zadatathatha|zadatathatha]] || [[word:zadatajaja|zadatajaja]] || [[word:zadatashasha|zadatashasha]] || [[word:zadataka|zadataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zadatathan|zadatathan]] || [[word:zadatajan|zadatajan]] || [[word:zadatashan|zadatashan]] || [[word:zadatakan|zadatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zadatathaoro|zadatathaoro]] || [[word:zadatajaoro|zadatajaoro]] || [[word:zadatashaoro|zadatashaoro]] || [[word:zadatakaoro|zadatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
